sEn: Abundant Intelligence explores the concept of intelligence as a plentiful resource rather than a scarce one.
sZh: 丰富智能探讨了智能作为一种丰富资源而非稀缺资源的概念。
absZh: 管理编辑文章登出登录

contrib.en: Proposes scaling AI infrastructure to gigawatt levels for transformative applications.
contrib.zh: 提出将AI基础设施扩展到吉瓦级别，用于变革性应用。

contrib.en: Argues that abundant compute can solve major problems like cancer and education.
contrib.zh: 认为充足的算力可以解决癌症和教育等重大问题。

contrib.en: Describes a vision of building a factory producing 1 GW of AI infrastructure weekly.
contrib.zh: 描述了每周建造1吉瓦AI基础设施工厂的愿景。

contrib.en: Emphasizes innovation across chips, power, buildings, and robotics.
contrib.zh: 强调在芯片、电力、建筑和机器人领域的创新。

contrib.en: Advocates for US leadership in AI infrastructure to compete globally.
contrib.zh: 倡导美国在AI基础设施方面领先以参与全球竞争。

limits.en: The 10 GW compute requirement is speculative and lacks technical feasibility analysis.
limits.zh: 10吉瓦算力需求是推测性的，缺乏技术可行性分析。

limits.en: Assumes linear scaling of AI capabilities with compute, ignoring algorithmic limits.
limits.zh: 假设AI能力随算力线性扩展，忽略了算法限制。

limits.en: Does not address energy sustainability or environmental impact of massive compute.
limits.zh: 未解决大规模算力的能源可持续性或环境影响。

limits.en: The economic and financing model for such infrastructure is not detailed.
limits.zh: 此类基础设施的经济和融资模式未详细说明。

limits.en: Ignores potential societal risks of concentrated AI power and access inequality.
limits.zh: 忽视了AI权力集中和访问不平等的潜在社会风险。

paras.zh: 管理 编辑 帖子 登出 登录 [](https://posthaven.com/)

paras.en: Growth in the use of AI services has been astonishing; we expect it to be even more astonishing going forward.
paras.zh: AI 服务的增长令人惊叹；我们预计未来将更加惊人。

paras.en: As AI gets smarter, access to AI will be a fundamental driver of the economy, and maybe eventually something we consider a fundamental human right. Almost everyone will want more AI working on their behalf.
paras.zh: 随着 AI 变得越来越智能，获取 AI 将成为经济的基本驱动力，甚至可能最终成为我们视为基本人权的东西。几乎每个人都希望有更多的 AI 为他们工作。

paras.en: To be able to deliver what the world needs—for inference compute to run these models, and for training compute to keep making them better and better—we are putting the groundwork in place to be able to significantly expand our ambitions for building out AI infrastructure.
paras.zh: 为了能够提供世界所需——用于运行这些模型的推理算力，以及用于不断改进它们的训练算力——我们正在奠定基础，以便能够显著扩大我们建设 AI 基础设施的雄心。

paras.en: If AI stays on the trajectory that we think it will, then amazing things will be possible. Maybe with 10 gigawatts of compute, AI can figure out how to cure cancer. Or with 10 gigawatts of compute, AI can figure out how to provide customized tutoring to every student on earth. If we are limited by compute, we’ll have to choose which one to prioritize; no one wants to make that choice, so let’s go build.
paras.zh: 如果 AI 保持我们认为的轨迹，那么将有可能实现惊人的事情。也许用 10 吉瓦的算力，AI 可以找到治愈癌症的方法。或者用 10 吉瓦的算力，AI 可以为地球上的每个学生提供个性化辅导。如果我们受限于算力，我们将不得不选择优先处理哪个；没有人愿意做出这种选择，所以让我们去建设吧。

paras.en: Our vision is simple: we want to create a factory that can produce a gigawatt of new AI infrastructure every week. The execution of this will be extremely difficult; it will take us years to get to this milestone and it will require innovation at every level of the stack, from chips to power to building to robotics. But we have been hard at work on this and believe it is possible. In our opinion, it will be the coolest and most important infrastructure project ever. We are particularly excited to build a lot of this in the US; right now, other countries are building things like chips fabs and new energy production much faster than we are, and we want to help turn that tide.
paras.zh: 我们的愿景很简单：我们希望创建一个每周能生产 1 吉瓦新 AI 基础设施的工厂。实现这一目标将极其困难；我们需要数年时间才能达到这一里程碑，并且需要在从芯片到电力、建筑到机器人的每一层堆栈上进行创新。但我们一直在努力，并相信这是可能的。在我们看来，这将是有史以来最酷、最重要的基础设施项目。我们特别兴奋能在美国建设大量此类设施；目前，其他国家在芯片制造和新能源生产方面的建设速度比我们快得多，我们希望帮助扭转这一趋势。

paras.en: Over the next couple of months, we’ll be talking about some of our plans and the partners we are working with to make this a reality. Later this year, we’ll talk about how we are financing it; given how increasing compute is the literal key to increasing revenue, we have some interesting new ideas.
paras.zh: 在接下来的几个月里，我们将讨论一些计划以及我们正在合作的伙伴，以实现这一目标。今年晚些时候，我们将讨论如何为其融资；鉴于增加算力是增加收入的关键，我们有一些有趣的新想法。

paras.en: Enter your email address to get email alerts about new posts on this site. Unsubscribe anytime.
paras.zh: 输入您的电子邮件地址，以接收有关此站点上新帖子的电子邮件提醒。可随时取消订阅。

paras.en: Enter your email address to get email alerts about new posts on this site. Unsubscribe anytime.
paras.zh: 输入您的电子邮件地址，以便在网站有新文章时收到邮件提醒。可随时取消订阅。
